title: Kasiol 3

{{Quote|While excellent swimmers in their own right, these residents of Kasiol's third planet spend an equal amount of time on land in the plentiful swamps.|Holobrochure for the Tagge Holographic Museum of Chandrila|<ref name="Creatures" />}}
'''Kasiol 3''', also known as '''Kasiol's third planet''', was a [[Planet/Legends|world]] located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Pelgrin sector/Legends|Pelgrin sector]]. Its surface featured [[Forest/Legends|forests]] and numerous [[Swamp/Legends|swamps]]. The local fauna included the [[herlixx]], a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Amphibian/Legends|amphibian]] [[Diet/Legends|omnivore]] that [[Hunting/Legends|hunted]] [[Fish/Legends|fish]] and smaller amphibians. Kasiol 3 had been [[Colonist/Legends|colonized]] by the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Description==
{{Quote|When not swinging through forest canopies, the average herlixx is a surface feeder, ''[…]''. It also uses its feet like paddles, skimming across marsh or river tributatires ''[sic]'' in search of food.|Holobrochure for the Tagge Holographic Museum of Chandrila|<ref name="Creatures" />}}
Kasiol 3,<ref name="CSWE" /> also referred to as Kasiol's third planet, was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|world]] that occupied the third [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position<ref name="Creatures" /> in the [[Kasiol system/Legends|Kasiol system]], a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Pelgrin sector/Legends|Pelgrin sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The planet's terrain included many [[Swamp/Legends|swamps]], as well as marshes, [[Forest/Legends|forests]], and [[Water/Legends|river]] tributaries.<ref name="Creatures" /> The [[Plant/Legends|flora]] of Kasiol 3 included [[Algae/Legends|algae]],<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Tree/Legends|trees]], and [[Vine/Legends|vines]]. Kasiol 3 was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[herlixx]], a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Diet/Legends|omnivorous]] [[Amphibian/Legends|amphibian]]. The creatures [[Hunting/Legends|hunted]] [[Fish/Legends|fish]] and other, smaller amphibians both in water and from the trees' branches<ref name="Creatures" /> and supplemented their diet with leaves and algae.<ref name="CSWE" /> To avoid predators, the herlixx hunted for [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] during early [[Standard day/Legends|morning]] [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]].<ref name="Creatures" />

==Inhabitants==
{{Quote|Often, when they encounter colonists, the reaction is a mixture of curiosity and fear—they will flee the settlers at the slightest unusual sound or sudden movement.|Holobrochure for the Tagge Holographic Museum of Chandrila|<ref name="Creatures" />}}
Kasiol 3 was [[Colonist/Legends|settled]] at some point by the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The colonists occasionally encountered the local herlixx, with the creatures frequently reacting with curiosity and fear to the [[Sentience/Legends|sentients']] presence. Kasiol 3 was mentioned in an entry of a [[Holo-brochure|holobrochure]] for the [[Tagge Holographic Museum]] of<ref name="Creatures" /> the planet<ref name="CSWE Chandrila">{{CSWECite|I|119|Chandrila}}</ref> [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]] dedicated to the herlixx, which noted that there existed no recorded instance of the creatures ever attacking sentient inhabitants of the planet.<ref name="Creatures" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kasiol's third planet was created by [[Rick D. Stuart]] for the [[1994]] sourcebook ''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]'', published by [[West End Games]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Creatures" /> It was identified as Kasiol 3 by the [[2008]] ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'',<ref name="CSWE" /> while the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Kasiol [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Kasiol 3, in grid square R-18.<ref name="TEA" />
